title: Printer Setup
overall_goal: To guide the user through the process of connecting, installing drivers for, and configuring receipt and label printers for use with the Linko-POS Desktop system.
rag_description: This guide provides detailed technical instructions for setting up and configuring receipt and label printers (specifically Sewoo and Xprinter models) with the Linko-POS Desktop application. It covers initial hardware preparation, model identification, and the process of downloading and installing specific drivers. The documentation details how to navigate Windows settings to adjust printer preferences and paper dimensions, as well as how to integrate and test the hardware within the POS software. Key user actions include driver installation, selecting printers in the Linko-POS settings menu, and performing verification tests via the order history and label printing modules.

content.description: Unpack the receipt and label printers and organize their cables. Identify the specific model by looking at the label located on the bottom of the device. Ensure cables are connected correctly, as improper connections will prevent the hardware from functioning properly.

Download the specific driver for your printer model via a web browser. Extract the downloaded ZIP file and run the installer by double-clicking it. For Sewoo Lite printers, select the model, enable 'Clone printer driver', and click 'Installation'. For Xprinter devices, agree to the terms, choose the installation path, and select 'USB' (if the USB port is not detected, choose 'Other' and manually select the model) before completing the installation. Verify the new device appears in the Windows 'Bluetooth & devices' settings.

content.step: Step 3: Configuring Print Settings and POS Integration
content.description: Adjust paper sizes by navigating to Windows Settings -> Bluetooth & devices -> Printers & scanners. Select your printer, open 'Printing preferences', and click 'Edit' to set your desired dimensions. In the Linko-POS software, go to settings, select the installed receipt and label printers, and click 'Add'. After the system restarts, go to 'History', select an order, and click 'Print Receipt' to perform a test print.

Before testing the label printer, load the label roll correctly by opening the side button and ensuring the paper is secured with the fixator. In Linko-POS, navigate to the 'Labels' section. Adjust the label dimensions on the right side, select your desired label template via 'Choose Label', and save. Select a product from the list on the left and click 'Print Labels' to verify the output.
